mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.program_id, r.rating, r.content, r.review_image, r.created_at, u.name, u.profile_img FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE program_id = #{programId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM review WHERE program_id = #{programId}

SELECT r.review_id, u.user_id, p.program_id, p.workshop_id, r.reservation_id, r.rating AS rating, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.review_image,
u.name,
p.title, p.thumb, w.name AS workshopName
FROM review r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN program p ON p.program_id = r.program_id JOIN workshop w ON w.workshop_id = p.workshop_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( user_id, program_id, reservation_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId},#{programId},#{reservationId},#{rating},#{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE workshop w JOIN ( SELECT p.workshop_id, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) AS avgRating FROM review r JOIN program p ON r.program_id = p.program_id GROUP BY p.workshop_id ) rating ON w.workshop_id = rating.workshop_id SET w.average_rating = rating.avgRating WHERE w.workshop_id = #{workshopId}
UPDATE review SET content=#{content}, rating=#{rating}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where review_id=#{reviewId}
